Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Um, you're not a member of this club, are you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Do you know him, Yamagishi-san?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Oh, yes, he's the one I was just telling you about.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I've heard a lot about you from Yamagishi-san, {f 4 1}-kun![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}We're looking for new members to join our club, so I mentioned you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}I'm really happy you decided to stop by on your own.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}And, um, I'm Keisuke Hiraga. P-Pleased to meet you![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}He should be the one introducing himself to you, Keisuke-senpai.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}You're the club leader, aren't you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Yamagishi-san is back, and now we're getting a new member.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Maybe I should be a little more active here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Wait, aren't you a third-year, Hiraga-senpai? Don't you have entrance exams coming up?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Don't worry about that! Hey, {f 4 1}-kun, do you have an eye for art?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Not to worry. You don't have to be a professional artist to join this club.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}I mean, I'm just a beginner, and I'm the club leader![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Heh, then maybe we'll get to learn a thing or two from you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Meeting you like this can't be just a coincidence. It must be fate...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Let's get you signed up, shall we, {f 4 1}-kun?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hiraga gave me a warm welcome.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I joined the art club and made[n]friends with the members.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Just so you know, only club members are allowed to enter this room.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}So don't forget to turn in your registration form.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}The art club meets on {f 0 1 2}Tuesdays, Wednesdays, and Thursdays{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}But we don't meet on the days leading up to exams. We should be studying then, anyway.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}You don't have to come every day, so just try to show up every now and then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}Who would've thought we'd end up in the same club?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}Okay, I'll get this all processed. Looking forward to painting with you, {f 4 1}-kun![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After joining the club, I decided[n]to go back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
